positive: A vibrant, retro 8-bit pixel art illustration of a group of friendly space robots exploring a neon alien landscape. Synthwave aesthetic, vaporwave colors (pink, cyan, purple), grid lines, arcade game style, isometric view, highly saturated.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, smooth rendering, realism, messy lines
